title: W3OS Content
description: Full shape of the data the Sentry sync engine reads from this repository. Use this schema to understand what each markdown file must produce, and to validate a generated manifest before merge.

domains.description: Security domains. Each domain maps to a requirements markdown file at requirements/{id}-{slug}.md

guides.description: All guide markdown files found under guides/. Each file must contain a valid HTML comment metadata block.

id.description: Two-digit numeric domain ID matching the filename prefix (e.g. '01').

slug.description: URL-safe slug. Combined with id to form the requirements filename: {id}-{slug}.md

description.description: Optional short description of the domain.

requirementId.description: Requirement identifier. Format: SP-{DOMAIN_CODE}-{NNN}. Must be unique within a domain.

title.description: Short title of the requirement, parsed from **SP-XX-NNN: Title** in the markdown.

section.description: Section heading under which this requirement falls (### **Section Name** in markdown). May be empty string for requirements before any section header.

controlPoints.description: Bullet-point control points that define compliance for this requirement. Parsed from `- ` lines following the requirement header.

order.description: Zero-based position of this requirement within its domain file.

w3osId.description: Unique guide identifier sourced from the `id` field in the guide's HTML comment metadata block.

title.description: Extracted from the first <h1>, <h2> Configuration Guide heading, or # heading in the file.

description.description: Short description. Auto-derived for CONFIGURATION guides; extracted from the Overview section for GUIDE type.

category.description: Derived from folder path under guides/. Examples: 'Business Tools', 'Communication Platforms', 'DevOps Accounts', 'General Security'.

checklistItems.description: All `- [ ]` checklist items parsed from the guide. At least one is required for the sync to accept the guide.
